description.ko: 완벽한 흑요석 단일 구조물이 디지털 소용돌이로 산산조각 나는 건축적 엔트로피에 대한 연구로, 브루탈리즘 기하학파 공격적인 글리치 미학을 결합했습니다.
description.en: A study of architectural entropy where a perfect obsidian monolith shatters into a digital vortex, blending brutalist geometry with aggressive glitch aesthetics.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract by KURO-X, titled 'The Fractal Glitch Singularity.' The structure is caught in a violent moment of mathematical deconstruction, shattering into a spiraling vortex of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy pixel-sorting artifacts, digital scanlines, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration tear through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the precise moment of calculated chaos within perfect geometric order.
